title: Allegations of unauthorised cattle transport not enough to invoke preventive detention: J&K High Court
description: The High Court of Jammu and Kashmir and Ladakh recently observed that mere allegations that a person was involved in the unauthorised transport of cattle is not sufficient to place him under preventive detention [Kamal @kaka V/s UT of J&K].Justice Sanjay Dhar added that there must be material showing that such acts have resulted in or have the potential to cause public outrage before preventive detention laws can be invoked. The detaining authority must record specific subjective satisfactio
